name: unykorn-master
description: UnyKorn protocol monorepo — TLD registry, smart contracts, wallet UI

scripts.full-build: node scripts/inventory.mjs && node scripts/build-registry.mjs && node scripts/build-proof-pack.mjs
scripts.lp:check: npm run lp:check:usdc && npm run lp:check:wavax
scripts.lp:check:usdc: cd packages/unyKorn-contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/checkLP.ts --network avalanche
scripts.lp:check:wavax: cd packages/unyKorn-contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/checkLP.ts --network avalanche
scripts.x402:build: npm run x402:build:core && npm run x402:build:metering && npm run x402:build:facilitator && npm run x402:build:gateway && npm run x402:build:sdk && npm run x402:build:pricing && npm run x402:build:treasury
scripts.x402:db:migrate: for f in db/migrations-x402/*.sql; do psql fth_x402 < $f; done
scripts.x402:smoke:all: npm run x402:smoke && npm run x402:smoke:channels && npm run x402:smoke:e2e
scripts.prod:build: npm run x402:build && npm run guardian:build
scripts.prod:up: cd aws/docker && docker compose -f docker-compose.production.yml up -d --build
scripts.prod:down: cd aws/docker && docker compose -f docker-compose.production.yml down
scripts.prod:logs: cd aws/docker && docker compose -f docker-compose.production.yml logs -f
